offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 vendor contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause financial penalties. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking of contract dates in spreadsheets.
problem: Missed contract renewal deadlines leading to financial penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows

Community forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry and email notifications for renewals
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
